items.q: If a reaction has a negative Gibbs free energy change, what does that mean?
items.correct: The reaction is thermodynamically feasible — it can proceed — but it may still be very slow.
items.misconception: A reaction with negative delta G will always happen quickly.
items.random_wrong: A reaction with negative delta G must be exothermic in every case.
items.why: Students conflate thermodynamic feasibility with kinetics, assuming 'spontaneous' means 'fast' rather than 'energetically allowed'.

items.q: When water boils, what is broken?
items.correct: Intermolecular forces (hydrogen bonds) between water molecules are broken — the O-H covalent bonds stay intact.
items.misconception: The covalent bonds between hydrogen and oxygen atoms are broken when water boils.
items.random_wrong: Water molecules split into hydrogen and oxygen gas when they boil.
items.why: Students don't distinguish between bonds within a molecule and forces between molecules, so they assume boiling 'breaks the molecule apart'.

items.q: What does a mole of a substance represent?
items.correct: Avogadro's number (6.02 x 10^23) of particles of that substance.
items.misconception: A mole is a unit of mass equal to the relative molecular mass in grams of any substance.
items.random_wrong: A mole is a unit of volume equal to 24 dm^3 at any temperature.
items.why: Students conflate the mole (a count) with molar mass (a mass-per-mole), because in practice they use moles to convert to grams.
Correct answer: K. “Li” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: Limewater turns cloudy in the presence of:
items.why: It's CO₂. “H₂” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.

items.q: A pure substance melts at exactly 0°C. An impure sample melts at -2°C. What is the depression in melting point?
items.why: The real figure is 2 °C. The wrong options cluster deliberately close — anchor the exact number to one concrete fact so it can't drift.
